Search Form for vehicle model, tire size or rims Choose a tab below to get fitment data for your vehicle or to find vehicles matching your criteria.

  • By vehicle what wheels will fit your car
  • By tire size what vehicles use this tire size
  • By rim size what vehicles use this rim size

About Us

Wheel-Size.com is a tire & wheel fitment guide for cars.
We strive to help you get the information you need about PCD, offset, rims and all other wheel and tire data that you need for your vehicle.

This guide is accurate and is updated on a daily basis.
This site, the materials, data, and the services are provided on an 'as is' basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
